title: Create template similar to powerpoint in monday
excerpt: We are looking for the ability to create a template in monday similar to a power point presentation/ google slides where users can just edit the content. It would also be great to have this as a monday doc and an option …

posts.author: Majalin (Majalin Tiu)
posts.cookedHtml: We are looking for the ability to create a template in monday similar to a power point presentation/ google slides where users can just edit the content. It would also be great to have this as a monday doc and an option for board view. We want to eliminate the need to download and pay for app to embed a powerpoint presentation/google slides.
